MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Pro Term Judge. James Green, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Judoni Bolder, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Vista Del Monte Apts., and Lauren Hallinan, Esq. represented Defendant, Teresita Williams. The Case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2003 Overruled

Gregory Harper, Esq., 510/704-0494, for plaintiff and opposing party
